longDescription:
The single skill at the core of `youcoded-food` — the actual food tracker. Manages a grocery/pantry inventory across the storage locations you configure (pantry, fridge, freezer, garage shelves, dorm mini-fridge — whatever you've got) and tracks fast food spending broken out by restaurant, item, and size. Handles receipt processing from photos or text, food identification from pictures, manual entry, age/freshness warnings, and spending summaries.

Data lives in two CSVs under `~/.claude/fork-file/` — `pantry.csv` for inventory, `fastfood.csv` for spending — both human-readable and exportable. Install this if you want the food-tracking logic without the full `youcoded-food` bundle's UX wrapping; install `youcoded-food` if you want the snarky-friend nicknames and the rest of the experience on top.
